query: I need a landing page for my new SaaS. It's a time-tracking app for remote engineering teams that auto-categorizes work from Jira and Slack. Target audience is engineering managers at 50-500 person companies. Need it live in 3 weeks, calm/professional feel. I have a logo and screenshots.
notes: New website from scratch — core skill domain

query: My pricing page has three tiers (Starter $29, Pro $79, Enterprise custom). The 'Most Popular' badge is white text on orange (#FFA500) and the disabled button is white on gray (#CCCCCC). Built in Next.js + Tailwind. Fix accessibility and contrast.

Review this React component for perf issues. It renders 500 products, re-sorts in useEffect every 2s, has grid-cols-3 with no responsive breakpoints, and creates new inline handlers per item. Mobile users say it's sluggish.

Rewrite my hero copy. Current: 'Empower your team to unlock the full potential of your workflow with our robust AI-powered platform.' Product is CI/CD observability for platform engineers. Brand: direct-but-not-curt, technical-but-not-jargon.
notes: Copywriting + brand voice — copywriting is a subdomain of web-design

query: Write the downgrade email for my error-tracking SaaS. User went Pro → Free. Brand voice: wry-but-not-snarky, senior-but-not-condescending. Tone: warm, no guilt, no play.
notes: Transactional microcopy + tone ladder — copywriting subdomain

query: My blog post hero image is the LCP element but it's lazy-loaded and there's no width/height on the img tag. Also the body text is 14px with 1.2 line-height. Fix the performance and layout issues.

I need to pick a stack for a static marketing site with a blog and one interactive pricing calculator. Should I use Astro, Next.js, or SvelteKit? Also need to choose between tRPC and REST for a partner API.

Set up tests for my Next.js app. I need unit tests for utility functions, integration tests for API routes, and E2E tests for the checkout flow. Also want visual regression on the design system components.
Add Dutch and French locales to my existing React app. Need to handle RTL for Arabic later too. Current setup uses plain strings everywhere.
Audit my app for security. It's a Next.js app with Postgres, Clerk auth, and Stripe payments. I think my CSP might be too permissive and I'm not sure about my session cookie settings.
Write a Python script to download all images from a given URL and resize them to 800px wide using Pillow. Output as WebP.
notes: Image processing script — no web design, frontend, or copy involved

query: Debug why my Kubernetes pod keeps crashing with OOMKilled. The container is a Go microservice processing Kafka messages.
Design a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS with row-level security in Postgres. Each tenant has users, projects, and billing data.
notes: Database design — not frontend, though it touches SaaS; web-design skill covers stack selection but not deep schema design

query: Refactor this pandas DataFrame operation to use Polars instead. The current code groups by user_id and calculates rolling 7-day averages.
Write a cover letter for a senior frontend engineer position at Vercel. Highlight my 5 years of React, Next.js, and design system experience.
notes: Personal writing/career — not web design or copywriting for a product

query: Explain how blockchain consensus mechanisms work. Compare Proof of Work vs Proof of Stake with concrete examples.
Set up a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions that runs lint, test, and deploy to AWS ECS on every push to main.
notes: DevOps/CI pipeline — web-design covers CI in chapter 15 but this is a pure infrastructure task

query: My WiFi keeps dropping on Ubuntu 22.04. The router is fine, other devices work. dmesg shows iwlwifi errors. How do I fix this?
Write a short story about a sentient toaster that falls in love with a microwave. Make it funny but emotionally resonant.
notes: Creative fiction — not copywriting for a product/website

query: How do I file taxes as a freelancer in Germany? I moved there last year and have clients in the US and UK.
